docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, PENNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST INC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HUANG, PENNIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PENNIE HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST INC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY HUANG, PENNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, PENNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST INC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE REASONABLE VALUE OF DAMAGES IS $5000.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-23-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST INC
